title: ゴルシ様、配下をそろえる

text_block_list.text:
I head up to the rooftop for some fresh air and
find Gold Ship and Grass Wonder standing there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No... I'm still lacking something I need as Horsegirl
Lord! I must go on a voyage to find the missing
piece!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A voyage does sounds lovely, buuut... not today,
I think.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone promised to have a race at the training
track, remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course. You mean to say that "time is of
the essence," yes?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But do your best! And even if you miss me, shed
no tears! For we shall meet again someday!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Honestly, that Golshi. I'd better get a move
on and bring her back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, that would be very kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In that case, bring her back here if you find her. I
appreciate the help.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Golshi's set off on a voyage?! Rayos! But what
about today's race?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We must locate and capture la fugitiva! She's not
getting away on my watch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Golshi's on a voyage?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's trying to run away from racing me! I'll
find her if it's the last thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, haven't seen her. Come to think of it, didn't
everyone promise to race today?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okie-dokie. You betcha. I'll look for her on my
way back to the academy.

I search high and low for Gold Ship, but with no
sign of her, I return to the rooftop to find...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe... Someday, this whole world will
belong to Horsegirl Lord Golshi!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We finally found ya!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Do you have any idea how long we've been
looking for you?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! So this is where you were. No wonder we
couldn't find you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... Great work, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess ya found me... Heh. I s'pose they do say
that a criminal always returns to the scene o' the
crime.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I've been watching y'all from up here on my perch.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And it's helped me realize what I, Horsegirl Lord
Golshi, have been missing—what I really need.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Four Umamusume have come here in search of
yours truly... I assume you know what I'm getting
at, right?

Gold Ship's face is absolutely serious as she waits
for an answer.

The Horsegirl Lord and four Umamusume. Hearing
that, the first thing that comes to mind is...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I knew you had it in you, dear Watson! You
should be part of the Four—wait, it's the Four
Paladins, not the More-Than-Four Paladins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tell ya what, then—you be the hero! And if you
beat me, I'll give you half the world!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No more talking! To battle! C'mon! Gimme yer
best shot!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But you've gotta battle us first! GOTCHA!

El Condor Pasa and King Halo grab Gold Ship by
the arms and drag her away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! And now you get whisked away like a
cow caught in a tractor beam.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Why don't we build castles for the Four
Paladins in space?! We can fill them with booby
traps!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we all go running together first? That
way we can strengthen the bonds of the Four
Paladins too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Just don't cause any trouble, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want a wrestling ring in my castillo! And make
sure my doorbell's a gong!

The Horsegirl Lord may be chaos incarnate, but she
appears to have a good relationship with the Four
Paladins nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! In service of Horsegirl Lord Golshi are the
unstoppable Four Paladins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
El the Habanero! Sky the Fisher-Horsegirl! Grass the
Beast! The other one!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why am I just the "other one"?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna give me a ring name, then I want
something cooler, por favor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I think I'm fine with mine. That title sounds
like permission to sit back and do some angling.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... It looks like I may be the only one with
a moniker fit for fighting.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've got the Horsegirl Lord and the Four Paladins,
so now we need a hero.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'll also need someone to tearfully betray the
heroes, and a despicable advisor who's trying to
take over the country!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Geez, there really is no rest for the Horsegirl Lord!

And so, having found her Four Paladins, the Horsegirl
Lord's journey continues.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You buffoon! There's only one thing that could
bring so many unique individuals together—and
that's hot pot! Imagine us, a right old gaggle of
witches, workin' our dark magic 'round the
cauldron!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't look for reason or logic in anything this one
says or does...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got the munchies somethin' fierce now, but I
haven't got a cauldron... What about a clay pot?
We can at least scrape together some clay, right?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You guys, go out hunting for ingredients! Get us
some edible stuff, some inedible stuff, whatever
tickles your fancy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm heading out to find some clay for the pot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess I'll do some fishing, then...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Wait! It's still too early for dinner. We should
really prepare for the race first.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Absolutamente! I'm hankering for hot pot too,
but I've been really looking forward to this race!

In the end, Gold Ship gets dragged away by her
friends...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hot pooooot! Hey, you there! Get that hot pot
ready! Make sure there's enough to feed all of us!

She does as she pleases, going wherever the wind
takes her, without a care in the world.
And that's probably where Gold Ship's charm lies.
